productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid White Shirt
description: CompositionWhite shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a patch pocket on the left chest, embroidered branding on the left chest and two pleats at the backFitRegular Wash careWash dark colours separatelyMachine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergentDo not wring or bleachWarm ironThe sleek silhouetting on this neatly designed basic shirt from US Polo, captures the minimalistic mood of the moment. Create a dressy off-duty ensemble around this stylishly cut shirt. Style it with a structured blazer, classic blue denims and suede shoes, or simply wear it with chinos, formal shoes and a tonal belt. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
